Symbol: normalizeReference (function)
Defined at templates/cli/code-perception/normalize.js:54

Returns a best-effort normalized CodeReference. It never throws; malformed or
missing input degrades to a structured shape instead of an exception. The body
reads the raw entity, coerces the reference kind against the allowed enum, and
derives a stable reference id from the provider entity id. The search and impact
normalization paths both reach this builder, so it sits on the hot path of the
perception surface. No symbol graph is fabricated here — the shape is pure and
deterministic given its inputs.
